final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+), as the namespace was renamed to jakarta.validation.

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Migrate persistence and validation imports from javax.* to jakarta.* to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.why_exists: Compile error: javax.persistence and javax.validation packages are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3; classes will not be found.

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Replace Apache Commons Codec Base64 utility with standard Java 8+ java.util.Base64 API.
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.why_exists: Compile error: org.apache.tomcat.util.codec.binary.Base64 is not available or removed in the new dependency set; standard library replacement is required.

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Change JPA entity ID field from primitive long to wrapper Long to support nullability and proper Hibernate proxy handling.
Enable method chaining on setters by adding @Accessors(chain = true) and removing manual constructor.
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.before:
@EqualsAndHashCode(doNotUseGetters = true, onlyExplicitlyIncluded = true)
... public Recipe(String name, ...) { ... }

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Replace manual exception printing with SLF4J logging via Lombok @Slf4j.
Implement equals and hashCode to correctly handle Hibernate lazy-loading proxies, replacing Lombok's default behavior.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.2.6 to 3.3.6 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
final-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 or Jakarta EE namespaces; the application will fail to start or compile due to missing APIs and incompatible bytecode.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
final-project/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the compiler targets JDK 11, which may miss new language features or fail if the runtime environment enforces JDK 21.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Validation API to replace removed javax.validation.
final-project/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; javax.validation classes are no longer available, causing compile errors for validation annotations.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch Thymeleaf dependency from spring5 (javax) to spring6 (jakarta) variant.
final-project/pom.xml.why_exists: thymeleaf-spring5 relies on javax.servlet and javax.validation, which are removed in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE; using it causes runtime linkage errors.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector coordinates to the new groupId and artifactId for JDBC 4.2+ compliance.
final-project/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Spring Boot 3 dependency management; the new artifact is required for proper JDBC driver loading.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.xml.bind with jakarta.xml.bind API for JAXB support.
final-project/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind was removed from the JDK and is not included in Spring Boot 3; code using JAXB annotations will fail to compile or link without the Jakarta replacement.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove exclusion of JUnit Vintage engine as it is no longer needed or compatible with the new test setup.
Add MapStruct dependencies and annotation processor configuration for object mapping.
Add Lombok-MapStruct binding to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors.
Add Maven Enforcer plugin to mandate Java 21 and Maven 3.9+.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with release flag and annotation processor paths.
Add version management for thymeleaf-spring5 (likely for legacy compatibility or specific override).
Configure maven-clean-plugin to auto-clean on initialize.
Explicitly set spring-boot-maven-plugin version to match parent.
